word: G5082 - τηλικοῦτος - tēlikoûtos - tay-lik-oo'-tos - So great

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τηλικοῦτοςτηλικαύτη

- Transliteration: Telikoutos

- Phonetic: tay-lik-oo'-tos

- Definition:

1. of age

a. of such an age

b. of so great an age, so old

c. so young

2. of so great a size, in bulk

3. such and so great

- Origin: from a compound of G3588 with G2245 and G3778

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Masculine and feminine; from a compound of G3588 with G2245 and G3778; such as this that is (in [figuratively] magnitude) so vast: - so great so mighty.
